LanguageData.Stratum_AlreadyRemoving: This roof is already being removed.
LanguageData.Stratum_CancelRoofRemovalDesc: Cancel the removal of this roof.
LanguageData.Stratum_OpenCanopyDesc: Retract the roof canopy in this room.
LanguageData.Stratum_CloseCanopyDesc: Extend the roof canopy in this room.
LanguageData.Stratum_ReconnectRoofNetDesc: Cycle through available power networks for the connected radiator roofs.
LanguageData.MustPlaceOnRoof: Must be placed on a roof tile.
LanguageData.RoofAttachmentNotSupported: Roof does not support this attachment type.
